title: 10 best herbal creams for burns
description: Ulmus rubra, also known as slippery elm, creams helps with burns because it accelerates the healing process by forming a protective barrier on the affected area. The cream's astringent and anti-inflammatory properties soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and discomfort. Additionally, Ulmus rubra's mucilaginous properties lock in moisture, promoting healthy tissue regeneration and speeding up the recovery time.
